core_principles: Big Buttons, Zero Typing: Maximize touch targets (64px minimum), use pre-filled options over keyboard input.
Traffic Light Logic: Strict adherence to Green (Clean/Available), Red (Occupied), Yellow (Cleaning) for instant cognitive recognition.
Marathi-First: Primary labels in Marathi, with a seamless English toggle.
Control Room Density: Data must be scannable with zero decorative fluff.

scale.label: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold text-gray-500

spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum 64px (h-16) height for all interactive elements to prevent miss-clicks.

room_card.style: Flat solid background, 2px border, rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[120px] transition-transform active:scale-95
room_card.content_layout: Massive Room Number (H2), Status Icon, Marathi Status Text. Colors map directly to Traffic Light logic.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white h-16 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.status_action: h-16 rounded-xl border-2 font-bold w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 transition-transform

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom navigation bar (h-20) for core actions (Dashboard, Galla, Profile) to support thumb reachability.
navigation.desktop: Left sidebar or top header with clear Language Toggle (मराठी / EN).

forms.style: Avoid native inputs where possible. Use large Tap-to-Select grids. Aadhar OCR should use a massive full-width camera capture button.

motion.hover: Minimal hover effects. Focus entirely on touch states.
motion.tap: scale-[0.97] on all buttons and cards for immediate physical feedback.

icons.usage_rules: Use 'Bold' or 'Duotone' weights. Icons MUST accompany all text labels for low-literacy users.

images.description: Clean abstract geometric pattern for the login screen and Owner's Mirror background to give a premium, structured feel.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to high contrast. Colored surfaces (Red/Green/Yellow) MUST use their respective dark text variants for APCA compliance.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All buttons and interactive cards MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='room-101-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Construct the 22-room dashboard as the default root view.
Implement 'Big Buttons, Zero Typing': standard button height is h-16 (64px), text sizes should be large.
Apply strict Traffic Light coloring to the Room Cards. DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards for rooms; build raw HTML/Tailwind divs for precise color control.
Create a robust dictionary/context provider for the Marathi/English toggle.
Use standard browser APIs (navigator.mediaDevices) for the Aadhar Camera Upload simulation.
For Offline-First, ensure the architecture supports IndexedDB (e.g., using Dexie.js or standard IDB).
